title: A Wacky Song for Eurovision
summary: Look Mum No Computer is a musician who will sing for the UK in the Eurovision Song Contest. His song is called Eins, Zwei, Drei and it is very unusual and fun. It has German words and talks about desserts like roly poly. He is surprised the BBC picked his song because it is not like normal pop songs. The UK has not done well in Eurovision lately, with some singers getting no votes from people. Sam Battle, his real name, says he will try his best and be himself. He hopes people like him even if the UK is not a favorite. The song is crazy and different to stand out in the contest.

background_read: Eurovision is a yearly song contest where countries in Europe compete. Each country picks a singer and song. People vote for their favorites. The UK is a country that joins, but it has not won in a long time. The BBC is the group that chooses the UK's song. This year, they picked a musician with a funny and different song to try to do better.
Article_Structure: WHO: Look Mum No Computer, a musician representing the UK
WHAT: His song Eins, Zwei, Drei is wacky and unusual
WHERE: At the Eurovision Song Contest in Europe
WHY: To stand out and hope people like the UK entry

perspectives.description: Sam Battle is surprised but will try his best with a fun song.
